feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP SAC Live Data Connection Reduce the Data with the reduction of fields
entry.content:
Hello experts,
I am currently using a live data connection to the SAC. We use a S4Hana system and have the BW connection type. Is there a way to restrict the CDS view in the SAC so that I don't have to import all fields? There is this possibility in the import data connection.

Otherwise, I assume that I have to reduce the amount of data/number of fields in the CDS view, correct?

Best Regards
Niels

entry.title: View the execution plan of SAC widgets/ charts
entry.content:
Hello experts,
   I currently using SAC with a Live Connection to my SAP HANA database. When I create a Chart in SAC to view my data, sometimes I get the error "Fail to fetch data" (It has occurred randomly, not all the times) <See the image attached below>.
   The chart is about getting the Top 5 Best Sales Products by Quantity. The data source has about 2 million rows of data, and the Chart also uses the filter to remove the unnecessary products. I wonder whether the errors occurred because my server did not meet the resource requirement to query the data or because it was a SAC issue. So I want to view the execution plan, and query of each Chart/ Widget to run that query under my HANA server. Is there any solution? ( I found that SAC only has the Analyze Story Performance in View Time option to track the time of each Widget, but does not have the execution plan).
I appreciate your help.
Best regards,

Nguyen Thanh Hieu

entry.title: S4HC Public -> SAC - Delta / Incremental Transactional Data Loads
entry.content:
Hello,

we would like to implement the Delta / Incremental Transactional Data Loads functionality in SAC based on ACDOCA table in S4HC Public, but even after reading what we could find on the internet, we are not able to make it work. Our settings:

SAC Model: Planning - New Model Type

S4HC Public Architecture: 2 Layer - QAS and PROD

Connection: SAP S/4HANA Acquire Connection

From these two articles (attached below) I have come to a conclussion, that we have to create an OData service from the ACDOCA table and create a OData connection to it in SAC and then it should work. Problem is, that in our 2 layer S4HC Public architecture, there is no DEV layer and therefore it is not possible to develop these kinds of things. In would only work in the 3 layer S4HC Public architecture.

Is my understanding correct or is there some other way that I have not found?

Thank you very much for any help!
Merry Christmas,

Adam

A Simple Guide to Exposing an oData Service from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to the SAP Business Technology Platform Using Developer Extensibility

Solved: Expose CDS View as OData Service/API in S/4HANA Pu... - SAP Community

entry.title: About connection settings between SAC and S/4HANA Cloud(1YB)
entry.content:
So far, I have been working on importing and connecting SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Analytics Cloud.

I proceeded with the following steps
Setting Up Import Connection Setup with SAP Analytics Cloud (1YB)
https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/1YB_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

I created a Communication System and Communication Arrangement on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud side, but I was unable to create a Connection on the SAC side.

If you know of anything to be careful of or a better procedure, please let me know.
Thank you for your comment.

entry.title: How to write "IF THEN ELSE" statement with BEX query Key Figure technical ID object in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a calculation in SAP analytics cloud on story level which is 

• IF Net Invoice Value is negative then “Credit memo”

My source is BEx query and I have a key figure in the BEx query i.e "Net Invoice Value" which I want to use in the calculated measure.

The technical id of Net Invoice Value in the BEX query is [00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115]

I tried the following syntax while creating the calculated measure on a story level i.e

IF([00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115] < 0, "Credit Memo", "")

but I am getting an error message below while writing this logic.

"Formula could not be computed: Object is unknown: 00O2TKK8G8XRQO3VD5VBZC115. Please complete or rewrite the formula".

I will appreciate if you let me know what is wrong with the formula and how to use BEx object in the SAC calculation which has technical ID associated with it.

Thank You very much in advance.

Regards

entry.title: Getting trouble when using TUNNEL Live Connection from SAC to SAP HANA on-premise
entry.content:
Hi experts, wish you all a productive working day,
I've created a TUNNEL Live Connection from SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) to my SAP HANA on-premise. In the SAP Cloud Connector (SCC), I successfully created a Subaccount to connect from my SCC to my SAC.


Then I successfully created a Cloud to-on-premise to connect from SCC to SAP HANA.

After that, I go to SAC to create a Live Tunnel Connection to the SAP HANA but I got the error: You are not authorized to query the remote system. Please ask your administrator to grant you the InA role.

Then I went to the https://<SAC_tenant>/lcs/scc/tunnel/TUNNEL/sap/bc/ina/service/v2/GetServerInfo and got this error:

 

However, I have already granted InA privilege to the account under my SAP HANA system.

My company infrastructure:
Internet --> Company Domain(Gateway) --> Cloud Connector (inside SAP HANA on-premise server)


Best regards,

Nguyen Thanh Hieu

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Data Import Service with Integration Suite
entry.content:
Since I'm not able to use my private open connector directly in SAC, I want to create an integration flow in Integration Suite to connect my Open Connector to my SAC data model. To do that, I tried to copy the SAC API (https://api.sap.com/api/DataImport_API/overview) in the Integration Suite. However, an error message "host is missing" is shown (see image below).

My SAC url in the browser is https://{tenant}.eu20.analytics.cloud.sap. But in the API copy dialog, I can only choose other domains. Is that the cause for the "host is missing" error?

entry.title: S4 security roles in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using a generic id in the Tunnel Live connection to S/4. But the requirement now is to implement S4 roles in SAC, so that any user with a company code access should see only that company code data in SAC.

How we can implement this requirement.

Thanks,

entry.title: Calculations in a specific planning version
entry.content:
Good morning,
I am creating a story where I am copying data from the actual version to the planning version. When the data is copied to planning, it increases the gross salary calculation based on parameters. These parameters are associated with January 2024, and in the Data Action, the calculation is also linked to January 2024.

I have one button for copying and another button for the calculation. However, when I execute the calculation, it does not work. Could you assist me in resolving this issue?

I will send screenshots to provide more context to the question.

The purpose of the table is that in January 2025, a 50% increase is applied to "Rec1," meaning it should have 1,200 euros plus 50%.

Thanks in advance,

Ganjos

entry.title: Incremental and full data load in SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Could you please help me with how we can perform full and incremental(delta) loads in SAC.

Thank you.

entry.title: Import data from BW Bex query to SAC system
entry.content:
Hello,

I acquire data from BW Bex query to SAC system and mapped the fields. The data was refreshed successfully into SAC. Now I require to add one more field and assign new fields or calculated column to previous default mapping.

But I am unable to edit the mappings or BW Bex query to add additional field in SAC. Just showing view mode only.

Is it something I don’t have authorization to edit the existing mappings or SAC tool itself is not provided to edit the mappings.

Please clarify me.

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: SAC | Creating dynamic thresholds for the sac tables.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm currently facing a challenge where a client has requested a feature in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). They need a table that has threshold, but they want the ability to adjust these thresholds (change the thresholds ranges) dynamically without having to go through the process of editing the entire story each time. Is there a way to implement such functionality in SAC? 

Any insights would be appreciated.

entry.title: SAC on Signage TV iiyama
entry.content:
Hello i am wondering if there is a possbility to display reports on a TV. 
I see that you can create a link and access but only SAC users can access. Is there a way to make some kind of kiosk mode of a report so that i can easily share this on our TV?

If not, is there any possiblity to generate a URL with my credentials to to auto login and display the report?

What other solutions are possible?

Thank you!

entry.title: OpenID for SAC
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is it possible to configure OpenID Connect for user authentication  (SSO)  between SAC and IAS, when IAS is configured as a proxy ?

Or is SAML 2.0 the only supported and recommended method?

Thank you.

entry.title: SSO Error in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need your help.

I have configured IAS as a proxy, and in IAS, I have set the Subject Name Identifier=employee_id

In Azure (OpenID Connection to IAS), I have added the employee_id to Additional Claims.

In the source system (Azure) in IPS, I have configured the transformation as follows:

{
"sourcePath": "$.employeeId",
"targetPath": "$.userName",
"correlationAttribute": true
}

Also in IPS transformation I replaced "sourcePath": "$.userPrincipalName" with "sourcePath": "$.employeeId".

Users are provisioned with IPS.

In IAS, the "Login Name" field for users receives the employee_id, for example, 1111. These users are then provisioned to SAC and have the employee_id (1111) in the "USER ID" field as well.

When I try to test SSO and select "Choose a user attribute to map to your Identity Provider" -> User attribute set = "USER ID", the user is not found in SAC.

The user accesses the SAC link and enters their email address. The user is authenticated in Azure, but in SAC, the user is not found.

I need help.

I can't solve this by myself.

Thank you very much !!!

entry.title: Is there any way to sync an all-Page filter with an Input_Control filter?
entry.content:
I have a bar chart in Page 1. I want to select a dimension in the bar chart from Page 1 to filter whole of Page 2 using that value.

I'm able to do this, but the problem is that I already have an Input Control page filter on Page 2; the value of which is not changing because of the Page 1 filter. Is there any way to sync the All-Page / Story filter with an Input Control filter?

entry.title: How to show the Story Filter value in a Textbox in SAC?
entry.content:
I want to show the story filter value in a textbox. If 'All' is selected in the filter, then it should show 'All Business Units' otherwise it should show only the specific value that is selected. 

Currently what I did: I used a dynamic text & added that in the textbox. It shows 'All Business Units' when 'All' is selected in the filter, but if other options are selected (for example X or Y), then it is showing 'X Business Units' or 'Y Business Units' because the Business Units section is hardcoded in the textbox. I only want to show X or Y when the specific option is selected in the filter.

Is this possible to achieve? Kindly suggest if there's any way to achieve this!

entry.title: How to change a numeric value to a percentage value in a numeric point chart in SAC?
entry.content:
I have a numeric point chart which shows some value & this value is coming from a filter / input_control in SAC.

I want to use a button to switch between a numeric value & a percentage value in the chart. Is this possible to achieve? Kindly share solutions, if possible!

entry.title: best design for using SAP SAC data into a SAP Fiori - CDS flavour
entry.content:
Hello

User case: We need to solve a consumption scenario based on SAP Sac calculated data into SAP S/4 backend

Users will need to consult a field (CeCo) that will be available on SAP SAC models. The initial proposed design is based on the construction of a CDS-OData flavour that connect to SAC, pull the data and show to the backend users. Scope +1500 SAP backend users

Can someone share her/his opinion about this scenario, the best approach, the alternatives and their knowledge?

Can we think in some kind of SDA federation of the data, can we persist the data in an intermediate layer (i,e BW) o whatever?

I will appreciate your help in advanced

Kind regards

entry.title: SAC User Attribute Mapping
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I understand there are multiple ways to create users in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC):

1. Dynamic User Creation and

2. Provisioning via IPS.

Which method is generally recommended, and under what cases?

Similarly, for assigning user attributes, there are two options:

1. SAML Attribute Mapping and

2. IPS Transformation.

"targetPath": "$['urn:sap:params:scim:schemas:extension:sac:2.0:group-roles']['roles'][1]['value']",
"condition": "$.displayName == 'group'",
"constant": "PROFILE:sap.epm:Admin",

Which method is recommended, and when should each method be used?

 

Many thanks
